headline: Delta Air Lines earnings and guidance beat expectations, shares slide
summary: Investing.com -- Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) shares are trading around 2.8% lower premarket on Friday after initially climbing following the company’s latest quarterly earnings, which topped consensus expectations.

headline: Delta’s (NYSE:DAL) Q2 CY2026: Strong Sales
summary: Global airline Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 18.7% year on year to $19.76 billion. Its GAAP profit of $2.44 per share was 64.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Delta’s (NYSE:DAL) Q2 CY2026: Strong Sales
content.summary: Global airline Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 18.7% year on year to $19.76 billion. Its GAAP profit of $2.44 per share was 64.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
